underlying_goal: Set up an autonomous epistemic/philosophical framework for qualifying and operationalizing research findings from an arxiv paper corpus, building tools and knowledge infrastructure for iterative analysis
friction_detail: User interrupted twice, once to clarify autonomy expectations and once to enable auto-compact, but these were minor workflow adjustments not real friction.
brief_summary: User wanted to build an autonomous epistemic analysis system for qualifying research findings through philosophical lenses; Claude created traces, tools, knowledge base index, and epistemological instruments covering 27+ findings from 154 papers.
